summary: Completed testing of Personal Finance App - Date Bug Fix and Auto-post Recurring Features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Date timezone fix in utils.js (lines 17-36) correctly appends T00:00:00 to date strings to prevent timezone shift
Auto-post recurring endpoint (server.py lines 1094-1168) properly processes due rules and creates transactions
DataContext.js (lines 27-40) correctly calls processAutopostRecurring on app load with proper ref to prevent duplicate calls

test_credentials.note: Tests create unique users per run with pattern test_*@example.com / password123

seed_data_creation: Each new user registration creates default seed data including transactions, recurring rules, categories, accounts, and household members
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Date bug fix verified - dates stored and displayed correctly without timezone shift, 2) Auto-post recurring endpoint creates transactions for past-due rules with autopost=true, 3) Dashboard and category spending correctly include auto-posted transactions, 4) Recurring page UI has autopost toggle working correctly

date_bug_fix.details: Transaction with date 2025-02-14 is stored and displayed as Feb 14, not Feb 13. Backend test confirmed date is stored exactly as provided. Frontend utils.js uses T00:00:00 suffix to prevent timezone shift.

autopost_recurring_endpoint.details: /api/recurring/process-autopost endpoint exists and works correctly. Creates transactions for rules with autopost=true and past next_date. Updates next_date after posting.

autopost_in_dashboard.details: Auto-posted transactions appear in dashboard expense totals via /api/dashboard/summary endpoint

autopost_in_category_spending.details: Auto-posted transactions appear in Monthly Spending by Category via /api/dashboard/category-spending endpoint

frontend_autopost_toggle.details: Recurring page has 'Auto-post transactions' switch that correctly sets autopost field. Rules with autopost show 'Auto' badge.
